title: Hiding subitem columns in a Table widget on a dashboard
excerpt:
I have a few boards with normal tasks and subtasks.  I’ve tagged a few columns on the subitems as hidden on a new view that I’ve made as the default view. 
Then I create a dashboard linked to these boards.  I added a Tab…

posts.author: annali (Anna Li)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have a few boards with normal tasks and subtasks. I’ve tagged a few columns on the subitems as hidden on a new view that I’ve made as the default view.

Then I create a dashboard linked to these boards. I added a Table widget. i can customize the columns at the task level but I cannot customize columns at the sub-task level. All the sub item columns that I marked as hidden still show up.

I also cannot disable the subitem view.

Any suggestions?

posts.author: EitanG01 (Eitan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Anna Li:

Then I create a dashboard linked to these boards. I added a Table widget. i can customize the columns at the task level but I cannot customize columns at the sub-task level. All the sub item columns that I marked as hidden still show up.

I also cannot disable the subitem view.

I currently have the exact same problem when I’m trying to hide sub-items columns on the dashboard table widget. did you find any solution to deal with that?

posts.author: IzzyLu (Isabell Lu)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Anna, I have the same problem and found this feature request:

Option to choose or hide the sub-items column in Table Widget. Feature requests
[MicrosoftTeams-image (19)]
